reviews.review_body: bloom international school is very good in noida ext.but one complain is our side my daughter new admission for this year class 7th section c, child name chahat mishra my daughter is saying  to me 7th calss section c all student  worried to my daughter  so that please help my child then continue study my daughter this school.all teacher is very helpful so that my concern is noted that

reviews.author: Reetesh kumar
reviews.review_body:
Bloom International School (BIS) stands out as one of the top CBSE schools in Noida Extension, known for its commitment to providing excellent academics and sports facilities to its students. With a focus on holistic education, BIS strives to nurture well-rounded individuals who excel not only in academics but also in extracurricular activities.

Academically, BIS maintains high standards of education, offering a comprehensive curriculum designed to foster critical thinking, creativity, and lifelong learning skills among students. The school's dedicated faculty members are committed to providing quality education and personalized attention to every student, ensuring their academic success.

In addition to academics, BIS places a strong emphasis on sports and physical education. The school boasts state-of-the-art sports facilities and encourages students to participate in a variety of sports activities, promoting physical fitness, teamwork, and sportsmanship.

By providing a nurturing and supportive learning environment, along with opportunities for holistic development through academics and sports, Bloom International School aims to empower students to achieve their full potential and become responsible global citizens.

reviews.author: Rachna Verma
reviews.review_body: My daughter is studying last 8 years in bloom international school 🏫.she is enjoying school atmosphere and study.All teachers and school management are very good,they are very cooperative.I really thankful to all.I am satisfied with all teachers.Her class teacher Mrs.Ranjana singh is very polite and cooperative.I want give my special thanks to her because she inspires students to achieve success.Her teaching method is very good.

reviews.author: Mithun Ranjan
reviews.review_body: My Daughter and son studying in Bloom international school last 4 year in class 3rd & 8th, the school infrastructure is good, excellent teacher guidance and cooperative. i will give the 9 out of 10. I am fully satisfied with this school.

reviews.author: King_NubEz
reviews.review_body: I have 2 children 7th-B and 11th standard  and they are really became good in academics as well as other activities. Teachers are very cooperative and supportive. Really I am fully satisfied with this school.

reviews.author: Prachi Agarwal
reviews.review_body:
Hello myself Sahaj mother
He is studying in class IV D
I am happy with the overall performance and growth of my son. BIS is growing day by day and feel happy that I choose it for my son. This year I have to admit my younger one also.
His class teacher Ms. Pallavi is very nice and co-operative in every aspect. She is always ready to help him regarding studies or any other issue he is facing in class.
At last I really thankful to Pallavi mam for her support overall the year.
Thanks.

reviews.author: manoj kumar pandey
reviews.review_body: All the events was very good and energetic

reviews.author: Arun Kumar
reviews.review_body: Overall, my experience with Bloom has been satisfactory. They are dedicated to nurturing students to excel in all facets of life.
